slides.quote: BAGA NAGAAN DHUFTAN GARA WEBSITE WALDAA SAGALEE JIRAATAA ITOOPHIYAA
slides.subheading: Saaqamuun dubbii keetii ifa in kenna, wallaalota iyyuu in hubachiisa.— Far. 119:130
Yesus deebisee, Karichi, dhugaan, jireenyis, ana; anaan yoo ta'e malee, eenyu iyyuu gara abbaa hin dhufu.— Yoh. 14:6

Dubbiin Waaqayyoo jiraataa dha, humna hojjetus of keessaa qaba, billaa gar lamaan qarame caalaa qara qaba; inni lubbuu fi hafuura, buusaa fi dhuka gargar in baasa, yaadaa fi akeeka garaa namaas qoree faraduudhaaf in danda'a. - Ibr. 4:12
